creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, Jason.

There is problem with building of this port:
=======================<phase: configure      >============================
===>  Configuring for fastx_toolkit-0.0.14
configure.ac:22: error: possibly undefined macro: AC_PROG_LIBTOOL
      If this token and others are legitimate, please use m4_pattern_allow.
      See the Autoconf documentation.
autoreconf-2.69: /usr/local/bin/autoconf-2.69 failed with exit status: 1
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/biology/fastx-toolkit

Would you check it please?
